creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #3)
> (My mind is totally bent, today, by documentation in general.
> Not just Wine.)

Is there any change, addition,... to 
  files/wine-wow64.sh or files/pkg32.sh
or some other aspect of the port that would have helped you?

I'm not an expert on this matter myself, but happy to consider changes.
